Users](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#pro-users) Overview # API Pricing > ## Documentation Index > > > Fetch the complete documentation index at: [https://docs.venice.ai/llms.txt](https://docs.venice.ai/llms.txt) > > > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Prices per 1M tokens unless noted. All prices in USD. 1 Diem = $1/day of compute. ## [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#text-models) Text Models ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#chat-completions) Chat Completions GLM 5.1 Beta`zai-org-glm-5-1` Private Input Price$1.75 Output Price$5.50 Cache Read$0.33 Context 200K GLM 5`zai-org-glm-5` Private Input Price$1.00 Output Price$3.20 Cache Read$0.20 Context 198K GLM 5 Turbo`z-ai-glm-5-turbo` Anonymized Input Price$1.20 Output Price$4.00 Cache Read$0.24 Context 200K GLM 5V Turbo Beta`z-ai-glm-5v-turbo` Anonymized Input Price$1.50 Output Price$5.00 Cache Read$0.06 Cache Write$0.78 Context 1000K >256K context: $2.50/M input · $7.50/M output · $0.06/$0.78 cache Qwen 3.6 27B`qwen3-6-27b` Private Input Price$0.33 Output Price$3.25 Context 256K Qwen These models may be changed, removed, or replaced at any time without notice. [Learn more](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/beta-models) _Prices per 1M tokens. [View all models →](https://docs.venice.ai/models/text)_ ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#embeddings) Embeddings BGE-M3`text-embedding-bge-m3` Private Per 1M tokens$0.15 BGE-EN-ICL`text-embedding-bge-en-icl` Private Per 1M tokens$0.01 Qwen3 Embedding 8B`text-embedding-qwen3-8b` Private Per 1M tokens$0.01 Qwen3 Embedding 0.6B`text-embedding-qwen3-0-6b` Private Per 1M tokens$0.01 Multilingual E5 Large Instruct`text-embedding-multilingual-e5-large-instruct` Private Per 1M tokens$0.01 Text Embedding 3 Small`text-embedding-3-small` Anonymized Per 1M tokens$0.03 Text Embedding 3 Large`text-embedding-3-large` Anonymized Per 1M tokens$0.16 Gemini Embedding 2 Preview`gemini-embedding-2-preview` Anonymized Per 1M tokens$0.25 Nemotron Embed VL 1B v2`text-embedding-nemotron-embed-vl-1b-v2` Private Per 1M tokens$0.01 ## [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#media-models) Media Models ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#image-generation) Image Generation #### Generation Recraft V4 Pro`recraft-v4-pro` Anonymized Per Image$0.29 GPT Image 2`gpt-image-2` Anonymized 1K$0.27 2K$0.51 4K$0.84 GPT Image 1.5`gpt-image-1-5` Anonymized Per Image$0.26 Nano Banana Pro`nano-banana-pro` Anonymized 1K$0.18 2K$0.23 4K$0.35 Nano Banana 2`nano-banana-2` Anonymized 1K$0.10 2K$0.14 4K$0.19 Qwen Image 2 Pro`qwen-image-2-pro` Anonymized Per Image$0.10 Wan 2.7 Pro`wan-2-7-pro-text-to-image` Anonymized Per Image$0.09 Flux 2 Max`flux-2-max` Anonymized Per Image$0.09 Grok Imagine High Quality (SOTA)`grok-imagine-image-quality` Private 1K$0.08 2K$0.10 ImagineArt 1.5 Pro`imagineart-1.5-pro` Anonymized Per Image$0.06 Recraft V4`recraft-v4` Anonymized Per Image$0.05 Seedream V4.5`seedream-v4` Anonymized Per Image$0.05 Seedream V5 Lite`seedream-v5-lite` Anonymized Per Image$0.05 Qwen Image 2`qwen-image-2` Anonymized Per Image$0.05 Flux 2 Pro`flux-2-pro` Anonymized Per Image$0.04 Grok Imagine`grok-imagine-image` Private 1K$0.04 2K$0.06 Wan 2.7`wan-2-7-text-to-image` Anonymized Per Image$0.04 Background Remover`bria-bg-remover` Anonymized Per Image$0.03 Venice SD35`venice-sd35` Private Per Image$0.01 Lustify SDXL`lustify-sdxl` Private Per Image$0.01 Lustify v7`lustify-v7` Private Per Image$0.01 Lustify v8`lustify-v8` Private Per Image$0.01 Anime (WAI)`wai-Illustrious` Private Per Image$0.01 Z-Image Turbo`z-image-turbo` Private Per Image$0.01 Chroma`chroma` Private Per Image$0.01 Hunyuan Image 3.0 Beta`hunyuan-image-v3` Private Per Image$0.09 #### Upscaling Image Upscaler`upscaler` 2x Upscale$0.02 4x Upscale$0.08 #### Editing FireRed Image Edit 1.1`firered-image-edit` Per Edit$0.04 Qwen Edit 2511`qwen-edit` Per Edit$0.04 Grok Imagine`grok-imagine-edit` Moderated Per Edit$0.04 Grok Imagine High Quality`grok-imagine-quality-edit` Per Edit$0.10 Qwen Image 2`qwen-image-2-edit` Per Edit$0.05 Qwen Image 2 Pro`qwen-image-2-pro-edit` Per Edit$0.10 Wan 2.7 Pro Edit`wan-2-7-pro-edit` Per Edit$0.09 Flux 2 Max`flux-2-max-edit` Per Edit$0.19 GPT Image 2`gpt-image-2-edit` Per Edit$0.36 GPT Image 1.5`gpt-image-1-5-edit` Per Edit$0.36 Nano Banana 2`nano-banana-2-edit` Per Edit$0.10 Nano Banana Pro`nano-banana-pro-edit` Per Edit$0.18 Seedream V5 Lite`seedream-v5-lite-edit` Per Edit$0.05 Seedream V4.5`seedream-v4-edit` Per Edit$0.05 ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#audio) Audio #### Text-to-Speech Kokoro Text to Speech`tts-kokoro` Private Per 1M Characters$3.50 Qwen 3 TTS 0.6B`tts-qwen3-0-6b` Private Per 1M Characters$87.50 Qwen 3 TTS 1.7B`tts-qwen3-1-7b` Private Per 1M Characters$112.50 xAI TTS v1`tts-xai-v1` Anonymized Per 1M Characters$5.25 Inworld TTS-1.5 Max`tts-inworld-1-5-max` Anonymized Per 1M Characters$12.50 Chatterbox HD (Resemble AI)`tts-chatterbox-hd` Private Per 1M Characters$50.00 Orpheus TTS`tts-orpheus` Private Per 1M Characters$62.50 ElevenLabs Turbo v2.5`tts-elevenlabs-turbo-v2-5` Anonymized Per 1M Characters$62.50 MiniMax Speech-02 HD`tts-minimax-speech-02-hd` Anonymized Per 1M Characters$125.00 Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS`tts-gemini-3-1-flash` Anonymized Per 1M Characters$187.50 #### Speech-to-Text Parakeet ASR`nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3` Private Per Audio Second$0.0001 Whisper Large V3`openai/whisper-large-v3` Private Per Audio Second$0.0001 Wizper (Whisper v3)`fal-ai/wizper` Private Per Audio Second$0.0001 ElevenLabs Scribe V2`elevenlabs/scribe-v2` Anonymized Per Audio Second$0.0002 xAI Speech to Text v1`stt-xai-v1` Anonymized Per Audio Second$0.0000 ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#music) Music #### Song Generation (Duration-Based) ACE-Step 1.5`ace-step-15` Anonymized 60s$0.03 90s$0.04 120s$0.05 150s$0.06 180s$0.07 210s$0.08 ElevenLabs Music`elevenlabs-music` Anonymized 60s$0.87 120s$1.73 180s$2.59 240s$3.45 300s$4.32 360s$5.18 420s$6.04 480s$6.90 540s$7.77 600s$8.63 #### Song Generation (Per-Generation) MiniMax Music 2.0`minimax-music-v2` Anonymized Per Generation$0.04 MiniMax Music 2.5`minimax-music-v25` Anonymized Per Generation$0.24 MiniMax Music 2.6`minimax-music-v26` Anonymized Per Generation$0.24 Stable Audio 2.5`stable-audio-25` Anonymized Per Generation$0.24 #### Sound Effects (Per-Second) ElevenLabs Sound Effects`elevenlabs-sound-effects-v2` Anonymized Per Second$0.0023 MMAudio V2`mmaudio-v2-text-to-audio` Anonymized Per Second$0.0009 For exact pricing before generation, use the [Audio Quote API](https://docs.venice.ai/api-reference/endpoint/audio/quote). Duration-based models have fixed price tiers, while per-second models charge based on output length. ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#video) Video Video pricing varies by resolution and duration. Visit the [Video Models page](https://docs.venice.ai/models/video) for exact quotes, or use the [Video Quote API](https://docs.venice.ai/api-reference/endpoint/video/quote). Grok Imagine`grok-imagine-text-to-video` Moderated Anonymized Text to Video Durations 5s, 10s, 15s Resolutions 480p, 720p Starting At$0.32 Grok Imagine`grok-imagine-image-to-video` Moderated Anonymized Image to Video Durations 5s, 10s, 15s Resolutions 480p, 720p Starting At$0.32 Grok Imagine Private`grok-imagine-text-to-video-private` Private Text to Video Durations 5s, 10s, 15s Resolutions 480p, 720p Starting At$0.32 Grok Imagine Private`grok-imagine-image-to-video-private` Private Image to Video Durations 5s, 10s, 15s Resolutions 480p, 720p Starting At$0.32 Grok Imagine Private`grok-imagine-video-to-video-private` Private Text to Video Durations 5s, 10s, 15s Resolutions 480p, 720p Starting At Variable Grok Imagine R2V Beta`grok-imagine-reference-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 5s, 8s, 10s Resolutions 480p, 720p Starting At$0.32 Grok Imagine R2V Private`grok-imagine-reference-to-video-private` Private Image to Video Durations 5s, 8s, 10s Resolutions 480p, 720p Starting At$0.32 HappyHorse 1.0`happyhorse-1-0-text-to-video` Anonymized Text to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.79 HappyHorse 1.0`happyhorse-1-0-image-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.79 HappyHorse 1.0 Edit`happyhorse-1-0-video-to-video` Anonymized Text to Video Durations Auto Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At Variable HappyHorse 1.0 Reference`happyhorse-1-0-reference-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.79 Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro`kling-2.5-turbo-pro-text-to-video` Anonymized Text to Video Durations 5s, 10s Starting At$0.39 Kling 2.5 Turbo Pro`kling-2.5-turbo-pro-image-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 5s, 10s Starting At$0.39 Kling 2.6 Pro`kling-2.6-pro-text-to-video` 4K`kling-o3-4k-text-to-video` Anonymized Text to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Starting At Variable Kling O3 4K`kling-o3-4k-image-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Starting At Variable Kling O3 4K R2V`kling-o3-4k-reference-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Starting At Variable Kling O3 Pro`kling-o3-pro-text-to-video` Anonymized Text to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Starting At Variable Kling O3 Pro`kling-o3-pro-image-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 3s, 4s, 5s, 6s, 7s, 8s, 9s, 10s, 11s, 12s, 13s, 14s, 15s Starting At Variable Kling O3 Pro R2V 10s, 15s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.83 Wan 2.6`wan-2.6-text-to-video` Anonymized Text to Video Durations 5s, 10s, 15s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.83 Wan 2.6 15s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.70 Wan 2.7`wan-2-7-image-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 5s, 10s, 15s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.70 Wan 2.7 Edit`wan-2-7-video-to-video` Anonymized Text to Video Durations Auto Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At Variable Wan 2.7 Reference`wan-2-7-reference-to-video` Anonymized Image to Video Durations 5s, 10s Resolutions 1080p, 720p Starting At$0.70 ## [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#additional-features) Additional Features ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#web-search-and-scraping) Web Search and Scraping Web Search`enable_web_search: true` Per 1K Calls$10.00 Web Scraping`enable_web_scraping: true` Per 1K URLs$10.00 X Search (xAI)`enable_x_search: true` Per 1K Results$10.00 **Web Scraping** automatically detects up to 5 URLs per request, scrapes and converts content into structured markdown, and adds the extracted text into model context. Only successfully scraped URLs are billed.**X Search** enables xAI’s native search for supported Grok models (e.g., `grok-4-20-beta`). This searches both the web and X/Twitter for real-time information. Billed per search result returned by the model (e.g., if the model returns 10 search results, you are charged for 10 results at $0.01 e a c h =$0.01 e a c h=0.10).These charges apply in addition to standard model token pricing. ## [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#payment-options) Payment Options ## [USD Buy API credits with credit card. Credits never expire.](https://venice.ai/settings/api) ## [Crypto Buy API credits with cryptocurrency. Same rates as USD.](https://venice.ai/settings/api) ## [Stake DIEM Each Diem = $1/day of credits that refresh daily.](https://venice.ai/token) ### [​](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/pricing#pro-users) Pro Users Pro subscribers receive a one-time $10 API credit when upgrading to Pro. Use it to test and build small apps. Was this page helpful? Yes No [Suggest edits](https://github.com/veniceai/api-docs/edit/main/overview/pricing.mdx)[Raise issue](https://github.com/veniceai/api-docs/issues/new?title=Issue%20on%20docs&body=Path:%20/overview/pricing) [Privacy](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/privacy)[Deprecations](https://docs.venice.ai/overview/deprecations) Ctrl+I [x](https://x.com/AskVenice)[discord](https://discord.gg/askvenice)[github](https://github.com/veniceai)[linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/venice-ai) [Powered by This documentation is built and hosted on Mintlify, a developer documentation platform](https://www.mintlify.com/?utm_campaign=poweredBy&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=veniceai) Assistant Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes. ![Image 3](https://t.co/1/i/adsct?bci=4&dv=UTC%26en-US%26Google%20Inc.%26Linux%20x86_64%26255%26800%26600%268%2624%26800%26600%260%26na&eci=3&event=%7B%7D&event_id=2dfccbc0-fcee-4369-a342-159bbca769b4&integration=advertiser&p_id=Twitter&p_user_id=0&pl_id=34f8e8bf-06b2-452c-a48b-fb6657dba167&pt=Pricing%20%7C%20Venice%20API%20Docs&tw_document_href=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.venice.ai%2Foverview%2Fpricing&tw_iframe_status=0&tw_pid_src=1&twpid=tw.1778284088047.652535909315988768&txn_id=p2i0g&type=javascript&version=2.3.53)![Image 4](https://analytics.twitter.com/1/i/adsct?bci=4&dv=UTC%26en-US%26Google%20Inc.%26Linux%20x86_64%26255%26800%26600%268%2624%26800%26600%260%26na&eci=3&event=%7B%7D&event_id=2dfccbc0-fcee-4369-a342-159bbca769b4&integration=advertiser&p_id=Twitter&p_user_id=0&pl_id=34f8e8bf-06b2-452c-a48b-fb6657dba167&pt=Pricing%20%7C%20Venice%20API%20Docs&tw_document_href=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.venice.ai%2Foverview%2Fpricing&tw_iframe_status=0&tw_pid_src=1&twpid=tw.1778284088047.652535909315988768&txn_id=p2i0g&type=javascript&version=2.3.53)
